text: A street scene in a city, likely Mumbai, showing a yellow and blue taxi (auto-rickshaw) on the left, parked near a building with a 'Sultanu Dry Cleaner' sign. The street is lined with multi-story buildings and trees. Several other cars are parked along the right side of the road. The scene is bright and sunny.
